都内唯一の屋台ラーメン🍜 ◆チャーシュー麺 (¥950) [トッピング] 味玉 (¥100) 玉ねぎ (¥50) 海苔 (¥50) ほうれん草 (¥100) 八王子にある都内で唯一の屋台ラーメン！ 都心から離れているのに行列のできる人気店 日本ならではの屋台ラーメンは趣のある雰囲気と一度食べたら忘れられない味 カウンター席とテーブル席があるがカウンター席は予約することも可能。(詳しくはお店のアカウントをチェック) ≪店舗詳細≫ 【店舗名】屋台ラーメン しゅんやっちゃん 【住所】東京都八王子市初沢町1277-8  【営業時間】18:00〜23:00 【定休日】月曜・日曜   #東京グルメ #八王子グルメ #屋台ラーメン   ====================================   Tokyo’s Only Yatai Ramen Stand in the City 🍜 ◆ Chashu Ramen (¥950) [Toppings] Ajitama Egg (¥100) Onion (¥50) Nori Seaweed (¥50) Spinach (¥100) A one-of-a-kind yatai-style ramen stand in Tokyo, located in Hachioji! Even though it’s far from central Tokyo, people line up for this incredibly popular spot. This traditional Japanese street-style ramen offers a nostalgic atmosphere and an unforgettable flavor you’ll keep craving. There are both counter and table seats available, and you can even reserve the counter seats in advance. (Check the shop’s account for details!) ≪Shop Information≫ 【Shop Name】Shunyacchan Yatai Ramen 【Address】1277-8 Hatsuzawamachi, Hachioji, Tokyo 【Hours】18:00–23:00 【Closed】Mondays & Sundays   #japanesefood

A standout shoyu ramen spot in Tokyo. Their signature menu is the “Special Shoyu Ramen.” Built on a chicken-based broth blended with multiple soy sauces, the first sip brings out the richness of chicken oil, deep umami from the soy sauce, and a subtle sweetness. As you continue, the flavors finish clean and balanced. The charcoal-grilled chashu adds a gentle smoky aroma that naturally melts into the broth✨ The straight noodles hold the soup well, delivering its flavor all the way through each bite. The chashu comes in a variety of cuts, each prepared differently—from rich, fatty pieces to lighter, more delicate textures—letting you enjoy a contrast of juiciness and mouthfeel. [Ramen Sakurai 麺屋 さくら井] - Location: 2 Chome-15-27 Kamirenjaku, Mitaka, Tokyo, Japan - Hours: Mon & Sat 11:30 - 15:00 / 18:00 - 20:30, Tue/Thu/Fri 11:30 - 15:00, Sun 11:30 - 16:00 (Closed Wed) - Menu: Special Shoyu Ramen (¥2,000) #ramen #tokyoramen #shoyuramen #라멘

The Bengal 🐆cat is a unique domestic breed known for its wild leopard-like appearance and highly active personality. Its coat features striking spotted or marbled patterns that resemble a miniature wild cat, making it one of the most visually exotic cat breeds in the world. Despite its wild look, the Bengal is fully domestic and forms strong bonds with its owner. This breed is highly intelligent, curious, and energetic. Bengals enjoy climbing, exploring, and interactive play, and they require mental stimulation to stay happy. They are social cats that can be very affectionate, but they also demand attention and an engaging environment. When properly cared for, the Bengal cat becomes a loyal, entertaining, and dynamic companion 🫶🏼 #bengalcat #bengalkitten #bengalkedisi #bengalcats #fypage

Vitamin C plays a vital role in supporting the immune system through multiple mechanisms. As a potent water-soluble antioxidant, it helps neutralize harmful free radicals and protects immune cells from oxidative stress during infections. It is essential for the production, function, and movement of various white blood cells, including neutrophils, lymphocytes, and phagocytes, enhancing their ability to fight pathogens. Vitamin C also promotes the synthesis of collagen, strengthening the skin and mucous membranes as a first line of defense against invaders, and supports the production of antibodies and cytokines that coordinate immune responses. While it won’t necessarily prevent colds in well-nourished people, regular adequate intake (from foods like citrus fruits, berries, peppers, and broccoli, or supplements when needed) can reduce the duration and severity of respiratory infections and help the body recover more effectively. #funny #fyp #me #meme #fypシ

Diese One Pot Ramen Dumpling Suppe ist einfach das perfekte Comfort Food bei Regenwetter 🍜🌶️ Zutaten für 2 Personen: 2 EL rote Currypaste 2 EL Erdnussbutter 2 Knoblauchzehen, gepresst ca. 2–3 cm Ingwer, gerieben (hatte keinen da, aber schmeckt besser mit) 400 ml Kokosmilch 800 ml Gemüsebrühe 1 Stange Zitronengras (optional) 2 EL Sojasauce Saft einer Limette 6 vegetarische Dumplings 200 g Ramen Nudeln 200 g Champignons oder braune Pilze 2 Eier, gekocht und halbiert frischer Koriander/Petersilie schwarzer Sesam Chiliöl zum Servieren #einfacherezepte #feierabendküche #wohlfühlessen #nudelliebe #suppenliebe

Một chiến dịch quảng cáo mang tên “Tank Day” diễn ra đúng ngày 18/5 đã gây tranh cãi lớn ở Hàn Quốc vì bị cho là gợi lại biến cố lịch sử Gwangju năm 1980. Nhiều người cho rằng cách dùng hình ảnh và khẩu hiệu liên quan đến quân đội là thiếu tôn trọng với ký ức lịch sử của đất nước. Sau đó, làn sóng tẩy chay bùng nổ trên mạng xã hội, nhiều khách hàng tuyên bố ngừng sử dụng Starbucks, hủy thẻ thành viên và phản đối trước cửa hàng. Vụ việc khiến CEO Starbucks Hàn Quốc phải rời vị trí, đồng thời công ty mẹ và phía Starbucks toàn cầu cũng phải lên tiếng xin lỗi công khai. --- HÀN QUỐC TẨY CHAY STARBUCKS #thuonghieu #douong #starbucks

Ultra Creamy Buldak Ramen 🍝🥟 Ingredients 1 pack Buldak ramen 1–2 tbsp butter 2 cloves garlic (minced) 1 tbsp Kewpie mayo Buldak sauce packet Buldak powder packet 1 tbsp chili oil ¾–1 cup heavy cream Mozzarella cheese Dumplings Sausages Green onions Sesame seeds Extra chili oil (for topping) Instructions Cook noodles until al dente, then drain and set aside. In a pan, melt butter over medium heat. Add minced garlic and sauté until fragrant. Add Kewpie mayo, Buldak sauce, and powder packet. Mix well until it turns thick and glossy. Add chili oil and stir. Pour in heavy cream and mix until smooth, creamy, and slightly thickened (that rich orange color 🔥). Add noodles and toss until fully coated. Sprinkle mozzarella cheese on top and let it melt into the sauce. Add dumplings and sausages on top. Cover and let everything heat through. Finish with green onions, sesame seeds, and extra chili oil drizzle. . #buldak #buldakramen #eat #cook #Foodie

Tokyo ramen shop that earned a Michelin 1-star with just a single bowl. Run by Chef Matsumura, who has 36 years of experience as a French chef, the shop is known for presenting a “full course in one bowl,” with each topping crafted to a high level✨ One of their most popular items is the ravioli ramen made with foie gras and truffle. The rich texture filling your mouth and the refined flavors leave a strong impression. Paired with thin noodles designed to let you enjoy every last drop of the golden broth, it’s a delicate yet well-balanced shio ramen with thoughtful details throughout. [Ginza Hachigo 銀座 八五]  - Location: 3 Chome-14-2 Ginza, Chuo City, Tokyo, Japan - Hours: Closed Mondays, 11:00 - 16:00 (Reservation required) - Menu: Ravioli Gourmandise Chuka Soba (2,200 yen) #tokyofood #ramen #tokyogourmet #라멘
